# aireceipts

> Local, deterministic observable-cost-floor receipts for AI coding agents. One command, no account, no server — it reads the transcripts already on your disk, and they stay there. Covers Claude Code, Codex, Cursor, Gemini, and opencode; prints per-tool `≥` floors, tokens-only gaps, heuristic pattern flags, and a PR-ready receipt. Apache-2.0.

## Docs

- [Docs index](https://anandgupta42.github.io/receipts/docs/index.html): every guide, one page
- [Getting started](https://anandgupta42.github.io/receipts/docs/01-getting-started.html): install and print your first receipt with `npx aireceipts-cli`
- [PR receipts](https://anandgupta42.github.io/receipts/docs/pr-receipts.html): attach the session's cost receipt to the pull request it built
- [Trust](https://anandgupta42.github.io/receipts/docs/trust.html): determinism, price citations, and what never leaves your machine
- [Telemetry](https://anandgupta42.github.io/receipts/docs/telemetry.html): the content-free payload and every kill switch

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/anandgupta42/receipts): source, issues, releases (npm package `aireceipts-cli`)

## Optional

- [Buy me a samosa](https://anandgupta42.github.io/receipts/samosa.html): the project's tip page — why a samosa and not a coffee
